title: Cron job fires once per scheduledAt under sleep/wake

dimensions.description: After 1h of missed firings, did the runner emit exactly one catch-up?
Two timer-driven _checkDueJobs passes within the same scheduledAt window dedup to one execution?
When flag is off, _executeJob short-circuits with outcome=gated and bumps nextRunAt?
After suspendForShutdown, runJob refuses with note=shutdown?

_runner_status: TODO — runner ships with T6 / Tier-wide regression sweep. JSON shape is the contract.
